name: AI Chatbot
description: Beautiful chat interface with OpenAI integration

blocks.name: Chatbot UI
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const config = { title: ${b.getValue('title')}, apiKey: ${b.getValue('apiKey')}, model: '${b.getValue('model')}', systemPrompt: ${b.getValue('systemPrompt')}, target: '${b.getValue('target')}' }; if(typeof window.__createChatbot === 'function') { window.__createChatbot(config); } else { console.error('Chatbot UI not loaded'); } })();`

blocks.name: Send Message
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const message = ${b.getValue('message')}; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; if(typeof window.__sendChatMessage === 'function') { window.__sendChatMessage(message, target); } else { console.error('Chatbot not initialized'); } })();`
